name: Crimson Stellar Cube
desc: A mysterious cube containing unimaginable energy. Without proper utilization methods, it might simply serve as a crimson-glowing desk lamp. However, this particular cube seems to possess a unique built-in function?

name: Cluster of Crimson Stellar Cubes
desc: The shrine is filled with these strange cubes... Elis doesn't seem to mind bulk purchases. She even offers... discounts?

name: Mystic Violet Ring Spirit Key
desc: A mysterious card that suddenly appeared in your possession, likely a gift from the Crimson Lords. This "Ring Spirit Key" appears to temporarily connect you to a subspace network called the Ring Spirit Realm. The back bears an incomprehensible ID above your name. Regardless, it now belongs to you.

name: Spear Collection
desc: A bundle of preserved weapons in stasis...

name: Primordial Refit Blueprint
desc: Enables heavy industrial facilities to produce weapons from the Primordial Refit designs. Weapons modified by Rika, the Primordial Witch, are often bold yet practical variants of common Persean armaments.

name: Thunder March Blueprint
desc: Enables production of Thunder March designs - weapons based on Thor Batteries. Modified by Rika with even bolder designs that abandon practicality.

name: Dust Experiment Blueprint
desc: Enables production of Dust Experiment weapons and fighters. Designed by Dust Witch Nazeer, these push physics limits while maintaining lethality, though their wild aesthetics limit appeal to only the most daring captains.

name: Stellar Sync Blueprint
desc: Enables production of Stellar Sync designs. Nazeer's creations challenge physical limits with devastating results, though their radical forms demand equally bold commanders.

name: Rosarium Design Blueprint
desc: Enables production of Rosarium ships and fighters. Jointly designed by three witches, these vessels feature unique tactical systems ill-suited for conventional Persean warfare.

name: Pale Legacy Blueprint
desc: Enables production of Pale Legacy ships. Under mysterious intervention from the Pale King, these modified RIE vessels sacrifice crew safety and versatility for immense combat potential.

name: Deceptively Ordinary Scepter
desc: A crude-looking scepter likely crafted by a witch. While appearing mundane, your instincts suggest it might conceal power from an artistically-challenged creator.

name: Pale Ring Spirit Key
desc: An eerie, surreal card... No sane Persean would willingly carry this...

name: Pyrocontract
